title: Indian Flaky Egg Scramble
description: A spicy and fluffy egg dish inspired by Indian cuisine, made with flaky texture and a hint of spice.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Add flax seed to the eggs and mix well.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add spicy powder to the pan and mix well.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan and scramble the eggs.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
